description: You are a power systems engineer for a deep-space mission assessing battery survival for a lunar orbiter during the Total Lunar Eclipse of March 14, 2025. Using the background in ~/Desktop/Power_Analysis_Memo.txt and the baseline script at ~/Documents/missions/lunar_baseline.script, determine the single longest continuous Umbra duration (in seconds) caused by Earth and Luna occulting the Sun. Propagate the orbit for at least 3 days starting March 13. Generate an eclipse report at ~/GMAT_output/EclipseReport.txt and record the maximum duration value in a JSON file at ~/GMAT_output/eclipse_analysis.json with the key 'max_umbra_duration_seconds'. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
